title: Michel Lacombe
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Michel Lacombe''' is a French Canadian artist who has illustrated several Star Wars [[Star Wars comic books|comics]].

He was the penciller on "[[Lucky (comic story)|Lucky]]" and ''[[Walking the Path that's Given]]'' in ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'', and subsequently did the interior line art (both pencils and inks) for the following comics:

{{Artist-stub}}
